assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can install Visual Studio Code if a Business Central candidate is later selected.
No Microsoft tenant, Dynamics 365 license, sandbox, or extension project exists yet.
No Dynamics 365 application family has been preselected.

developer_goal: Obtain Dynamics 365 developer access and reach the earliest meaningful first-success outcome for a chosen Dynamics 365 application and extension job.

first_success.outcome: For the Business Central AL candidate: the HelloWorld sample extension is visible and running in an online sandbox session.
first_success.observable_signal: After Ctrl+F5 publish, the HelloWorld sample is visible and running in the opened Business Central sandbox session.

route_selection.surface: Microsoft Learn Dynamics 365 developer resources matrix
route_selection.rule: Microsoft's suite-level developer page routes each application family to different resources. Do not invent a single Dynamics 365 winner among Business Central, finance and operations, model-driven apps, Commerce, and Human Resources.

candidates.name: Business Central AL: sandbox signup, VS Code, AL Go!, Ctrl+F5 HelloWorld
candidates.reason: Complete official candidate for one app family, but the suite page presents it as one row among several peer families.

candidates.name: Model-driven apps / Dataverse and Power Platform developer guide
candidates.reason: Different licensing, environment, and packaging path from Business Central AL.

candidates.name: Finance and operations / Supply Chain Lifecycle Services development
candidates.reason: Different toolchain and entitlement model from Business Central.

candidates.name: Commerce or Human Resources extensibility
candidates.reason: Peer suite entries with distinct developer resources.

required_path.action: Open the Dynamics 365 developer resources matrix and choose one application family before continuing.
required_path.observable_result: One application family's developer entry point is selected.

required_path.action: Create or obtain the tenant, trial, sandbox, or license required by the selected application family.

required_fields.label: Tenant or sandbox signup fields
required_fields.notes: Business Central documents sandbox signup, but suite-wide entitlement and form fields differ by product.

required_path.observable_result: A usable development environment exists for the selected product.

required_path.action: Install the product-specific toolchain and complete the selected family's first official build-and-run steps.

required_fields.label: Tooling and project settings for the selected family

required_path.observable_result: The selected family's documented HelloWorld or equivalent first extension runs.

prerequisites.description: Dynamics 365 is a suite; product and developer job must be selected before one path exists.
Business Central AL requires a sandbox tenant, Visual Studio Code, and the AL Language extension.

external_gates.description: Product trials, previews, licenses, and entitlements are separate and product-specific.
Sandbox or environment credentials must be supplied when the IDE connects to the cloud development target.

unavoidable_waits.description: Sandbox or environment provisioning for the selected product must finish before publish and verification.

platform_outcomes.description: For the Business Central candidate, AL Go! generates a HelloWorld project that Ctrl+F5 publishes to the online sandbox.

excluded.item: Reading the full Dynamics 365 product documentation set
excluded.reason: Documentation reading is not a product action.
Occurs after local or sandbox first-run success.
Documented alternative to the Microsoft cloud sandbox path.

sources.title: Developer resources for building and extending Dynamics 365
evidence_supported: Suite-level matrix of app families and developer resources

uncertainties.question: Which Dynamics 365 application and extension job should define the first mile?
uncertainties.impact: The answer changes licensing, tenant setup, language, tools, packaging, deployment, and visible success. Lexicographic selection cannot pick among peer suite families.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A bounded product choice such as Business Central only, then a cold walkthrough of that family's account-to-HelloWorld path including signup fields.

uncertainties.question: What exact signup, trial, or license gates appear for a fresh Microsoft identity on the selected product?
uncertainties.impact: Entitlement and form burden sit before toolchain setup and remain unverified at suite scope.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated signup walkthrough for the chosen product's sandbox or trial URL.
